title: 宝塚記念の後に・なんとでっけえ雷鳴よ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Inari One bursts through, taking the lead!
And she's keeping it! Inari One crosses the finish!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Hehe, that was a doozy... I nabbed the win, but I
pushed myself way over the limit!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Damn it... Guess you got me there.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's my loss today. Truth is, I underestimated ya.
And I have the burns to prove it.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heh, hehe... I barely broke a sweat!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But I'm only lettin' ya off the hook this once.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'll be the one to win next time. And don'tcha
forget it.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Heh. Already has her sights on our next race, eh?
She's got a style all her own, I'll give her that!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(She's proud and loud. I may have won, but I let
my guard down for sure.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I needa learn from this. The centrals are no joke...
and the same goes for Tama!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: That settles it... I'll win this race next year too!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: From today, Hanshin's gonna see some real style!
